steps.title: Identify the size contrast
steps.content: The passage immediately contrasts examples (8–11 consonants) with the global median (22+), indicating Polynesian languages have a relatively small consonant inventory.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: The target meaning is “relatively small or limited.” “Modest” directly expresses this — it means limited in size, which matches the contrast the passage draws between Polynesian languages (8–11 consonants) and the global median (22+). The other three don't address relative quantity. That matches choice D — D is correct.
